title: Egg Guard
description: A simple 1.21.11 plugin that prevents the Dragon Egg from going into ender chests!
body:
A simple 1.21.11 plugin that prevents the Dragon Egg from going into ender chests!

Disclaimer: I have little knowledge of Java, this plugin was created by an AI clanker.
I am not responsible for any problems that may occur with your server as a result of this plugin. USE AT YOUR OWN RISK
